name: Power Strike
description: A heavy melee attack that remains useful through early boss fights.
scaling: Damage scales mainly with STR. DEX improves hit chance.

name: Iron Skin
description: Hardens the Warrior's body, increasing physical defense.
scaling: Every 10 VIT increases this defense bonus by 2%.

name: Battle Endurance
description: Increases maximum HP and slightly improves HP recovery.
formula: maxHp +3% + level * 2%, regen +level * 0.5% max HP per minute
scaling: VIT improves both the base HP pool and this passive's value.

name: Cleave
description: A wide melee swing that damages the current enemy and pushes progress toward the next.
scaling: STR increases damage. AGI helps maintain farming rhythm.

name: Shield Guard
description: Improves damage reduction while using a shield or guard item.
formula: 2% + level * 1.2% physical damage reduction with shield
scaling: Shield defense and VIT make this path stronger.

name: Blood Recovery
description: Restores HP after killing enemies.
scaling: Every 25 STR adds 0.1% max HP restored per kill.

name: War Cry
description: Temporarily increases physical attack.
scaling: STR-heavy builds gain the most practical value.

name: Counter Stance
description: Chance to counterattack after receiving a physical hit.
scaling: Every 20 AGI adds 1% counter chance, capped at 10%.

name: Armor Breaker
description: Deals damage and temporarily reduces enemy defense.
scaling: STR drives damage. DEX keeps the debuff reliable.

name: Berserker Rhythm
description: Consecutive kills increase attack speed for steady farming.
formula: per kill stack: 0.5% + level * 0.15%, max 10 stacks
scaling: Fast kills and AGI keep the rhythm active.

name: Last Stand
description: When HP is low, the Warrior becomes harder to kill and hits harder.
formula: below 30% HP: damage reduction 5% + level * 3%, attack +5% + level * 4%
scaling: VIT gives more time for the low-HP state to matter.

name: MVP Guard
description: Specialized defensive training against boss monsters.
scaling: VIT and defensive gear make MVP attempts more reliable.

name: Double Shot
description: Fires two quick arrows at the enemy.
scaling: DEX increases ranged damage and hit chance. AGI supports faster basic attacks.

name: Eagle Eye
description: Improves ranged precision and attack power.
scaling: DEX-focused builds gain consistency against evasive monsters.

name: Quick Step
description: Improves movement, evasion, and attack speed.
scaling: AGI makes Ranger safer and faster in easy maps.

name: Focused Aim
description: Temporarily increases hit and critical chance.
scaling: DEX and LUK turn the buff into stronger boss uptime.

name: Critical Focus
description: Improves critical chance and critical damage.
scaling: Every 20 LUK adds 1% additional critical damage.

name: Piercing Arrow
description: Fires an armor-piercing arrow that ignores part of enemy defense.
scaling: DEX improves damage and accuracy.

name: Windwalk
description: Temporarily increases attack speed and flee.
scaling: AGI builds can dodge more while the buff is up.

name: Hunter's Instinct
description: Improves rare drop and card drop chance as a relative bonus.
scaling: LUK adds more long-session farming value.

name: Arrow Storm
description: A rain of arrows that improves clear speed against groups.
formula: rangedAttack * (1.2 + level * 0.1), 25% progress toward next enemy
scaling: DEX raises damage. AGI raises baseline farming speed.

name: Weak Point Mark
description: Basic attacks can mark weak points, increasing damage taken.
scaling: DEX keeps attacks connecting. LUK supports crit builds.

name: Trap Preparation
description: Before each MVP fight, prepared traps damage and slow the boss.
formula: MVP opening damage rangedAttack * (1.5 + level * 0.5), MVP attack speed -4% - level * 2%
scaling: DEX raises opening damage.

name: Boss Mark
description: Increases damage against MVP enemies.
scaling: DEX and LUK both help boss-hunter builds.

name: Fire Bolt
description: A fire spell that burns earth enemies especially well.
scaling: INT increases damage. DEX improves spell reliability.

name: Frost Bolt
description: A water spell for fire-heavy maps.
scaling: INT increases damage. DEX improves spell reliability.

name: Lightning Bolt
description: A wind spell that punishes water enemies.
scaling: INT increases damage. DEX improves spell reliability.

name: Mana Control
description: Reduces skill SP costs and improves long-session efficiency.
scaling: INT makes the saved SP more valuable.

name: Arcane Recovery
description: Improves SP regeneration and restores SP after kills.
formula: SP regen +level * 0.35 and restore max SP * (0.4% + level * 0.2%) on kill
scaling: INT increases max SP and regen.

name: Stone Spike
description: An earth spell that pierces low-magic-defense targets.
formula: magicAttack * (1.55 + level * 0.11), ignores part of magic defense
scaling: INT drives burst. DEX improves consistency.

name: Elemental Study
description: Improves elemental damage and reduces wrong-matchup penalties.
scaling: INT-focused builds benefit most on targeted farms.

name: Magic Barrier
description: Creates a temporary barrier that reduces incoming damage.
scaling: INT sustains the SP cost. VIT increases the value of each reduced hit.

name: Spell Echo
description: Damaging spells can echo for partial damage.
formula: chance 6% + level * 1.2%; echo damage 35% of original spell
scaling: INT increases the base spell being echoed.

name: Flame Wave
description: A wide fire spell that improves farming speed.
formula: magicAttack * (1.1 + level * 0.1), 30% progress toward next enemy
scaling: INT raises damage. DEX keeps casts reliable.

name: Elemental Burst
description: A high-cost burst spell tuned for MVP attempts.
formula: magicAttack * (2.0 + level * 0.38), uses best known elemental matchup
scaling: INT makes the burst decisive. DEX prevents wasted boss windows.

name: MVP Ward
description: Reduces MVP damage and improves spell damage against bosses.
formula: MVP damage taken -2% - level * 1.2%, MVP spell damage +level * 1.2%
scaling: INT and VIT split offense and safety.
